transcript.text:
Mukbang YouTuber?
[How much can she eat?]
[About this much]
[I'm a YouTube that eats a lot]
[I can't watch this]
[Calm]
[Headache]
[She just eats]
[I'm just eating a meal and people are shocked...]
Hello everyone
I'm at Yongsan today
It says "35 years"
But it's actually a 43-year-old noodle restaurant
The weather is starting to cool down now And I've been craving some warm noodles
The building kind of looks like a pojang macha (tent-styled bar)
So they also call it Pojang Macha Noodles

This place is pretty famous
It really does look like a pojang macha
[You can see its age]
There are a lot of old restaurants here
I want to try all of these restaurants
All of them
Let's head inside
[Yetjip Guksu] [Seoul, Yongsan-gu]
Hello
Excuse me
I would like 1 of everything on the menu, please
[Pause]
Everything here?
Same portions?
Yes, that's fine
[43 years of tradition]

[Sweet & spicy noodles]
[Cold soymilk noodles]
[Kimbap roll]
[Kalguksu and Sujebi] (knife-cut noodles & hand-torn noodles)
[Rice cake dumpling soup]
Are all the broth the same?
[Based with same anchovy broth]
Bon appetit
Wait This is the regular one
Sweet & spicy
Sujebi Dumpling soup
Soymilk And kalguksu
Let's try the signature dish first
This is it The regular anchovy noodles
Check out the portions It's a lot
Let's try the kimchi first

The prices are really cheap
It tastes like the anchovy soup my grandma makes
It tastes great because the kimchi is good too
Both radish and cabbage
A lot of noodles
This place is really nice for nearby office workers
The portions are big The cost is inexpensive
If you would like some homemade food cooked by your grandmother
And it came out really quick
Some kimbap
Egg, burdock, pickled radish,
This brings back childhood memories
Not much in there but it's really delicious
What?
It doesn't even have ham or crab meat
Is it because of the rice?

I want to eat the sweet & spicy But gotta go with kalguksu because it bloats up
They have salt, black peppers, and red chili peppers
The portions
They give you a lot of food
The flavors are not too special or different
It's something you're very used to from your grandmother's cooking And it goes well with kimchi
1 bowl would fill you up
The black peppers give it more flavor
Nothing special but very tasty
Anchovy noodles from the market
Not too sweet or salty
Sujebi
I really love sujebi dumpling soup
Rice cake first
This can't go wrong
I'm a rice cake soup killer

Get a bunch on the spoon
Dumplings
It's delicious
You possibly can't go wrong with these
It's so good
So good
I'm excited for the sujebi
Handmade
Something my grandmother would make
It tastes the same
I always ask my grandma to make sujebi when I go over
This is very close to it
Hand-torn dough sujebi
With broth that does not have MSG
They do give you a lot of food
But I can keep eating because the flavors are not too strong

I can keep eating
Which one is your favorite?
I'm eating the sujebi right now and it's great
Okay, eat slowly
This is just what I like
It's also great with radish kimchi
It's usually eaten with cabbage kimchi
Kimchi is excellent
3 different types of kimchi here
And
These mussels are not fishy
I feel like I'm at the street market
Sujebi is #1 so far
This comes with bean sprouts and cucumbers
But I asked her not to put too much
This is like kimchi noodles without the soup

The broth is amazing too
Kimbap is really great too
They use the same type of noodles for this too
Some soup first
Nutty
A little bit of salt
Very nutty
And it tastes very original
It's not too special or extra It's just very original
I ate faster than I thought because the food overall is not too strong in flavors
I will finish before they get bloated
Tzuyang? Arent you really famous?
Not that famous
I didn't believe it at first But it really is her
Do you eat every meal like that?
Pretty much

And you don't gain weight? Interesting
We share 1 pack of ramyun noodles
How many packs can you eat?
I've had 20 before
[Mommy, I'm scared]
That was great
Can I feel your tummy?
I do have a belly
Let's see
Thank you for enjoying our food
The food wasn't too strong in flavors or special in any way
But they tasted very original Something my grandma would make
I'm very satisfied
Thanks everyone!
